summary: Section 4 Certification PASSED: Complete intelligence pipeline from data ingestion through watchtower analysis to board room cognitive delivery verified. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages (Login, Integrations, Board Room, SoundBoard) load correctly with expected UI elements.

minor.issue: 520 error on initial Board Room page load (handled gracefully with 'Intelligence link disrupted' message)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Section 4 Certification complete. All API endpoints working: watchtower/positions (sales CRITICAL, finance CRITICAL), watchtower/findings, watchtower/emit, watchtower/analyse, cognitive/escalation, boardroom/respond (with follow-up protocol), soundboard/chat. Integrations page shows 'BIQC is learning from 2 connected systems'. Board Room shows SALES CRITICAL and FINANCE CRITICAL escalation cards. SoundBoard chat interface functional.
